flashcards.definition: Detailed document assessing the environmental effects of a proposed federal action, required under NEPA.
Description of the current state of the environment before the proposed project (the 'before' picture).
Actions to avoid, minimize, or compensate for negative environmental impacts of a project.
What happens if the proposed project is NOT undertaken — required comparison in all EIS documents.
Evaluation of combined effects of a project along with other past, present, and reasonably foreseeable future actions.
